original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch on dark background (appears to be a photographic negative or blueprint-style reproduction). The sketch depicts a two-part device connected by a cable.

elements.description: A hand-drawn diagram labeled 'EXHIBIT I' depicting a suspended object. The sketch shows an arched canopy at the top labeled 'SILVER' with a width of '8''. Below it, a 'DARK CABLE' labeled with a length of '5'' connects to a rectangular base labeled 'BALL OR A CANISTER' and 'SILVER'. The page also contains the word 'CONFIDENTIAL' at the top and bottom.

judge.reason: Both sides agree it is a hand-drawn sketch of a device; Description B adds specific labels and measurements not mentioned in A, but they do not contradict each other.
